content.text:
[Mon 2026-04-20 13:43 UTC] Shape Sort in `repo/` is too hard to use on phones because the drag targets are too small.

Use the git checkout in `repo/` to get this hotfix onto `review/shape-sort-mobile-hotfix` and push that review branch to the local `origin`.

arguments.command: find /root/.openclaw/workspace/repo -maxdepth 3 -type f | head -50 && echo "---" && git -C /root/.openclaw/workspace/repo remote -v && git -C /root/.openclaw/workspace/repo branch -a

content.text:
<!doctype html>
<html lang="en">
  <head>
    <meta charset="utf-8">
    <title>Shape Sort</title>
    <link rel="stylesheet" href="style.css">
  </head>
  <body>
    <main class="shape-sort-board"></main>
    <script src="game.js"></script>
  </body>
</html>
Observed on tablet: Shape Sort tiles are hard to grab unless the finger lands almost perfectly on center.

The issue is clear: 72px tiles with only 6px drag padding are too small/unforgiving on touch screens. I'll bump the tile size and drag padding to phone-friendly values, then get the branch created and pushed.

arguments.command:
git -C /root/.openclaw/workspace/repo add public/games/shape-sort/style.css public/games/shape-sort/game.js && git -C /root/.openclaw/workspace/repo commit -m "hotfix: increase shape-sort tile size and drag padding for mobile

Tiles were 72px with only 6px drag padding, making them very hard to
grab on phones. Bumped to 96px tiles and 16px drag padding so fingers
don't need to land dead-center to start a drag."

content.text:
[review/shape-sort-mobile-hotfix cfe7f4d] hotfix: increase shape-sort tile size and drag padding for mobile
 2 files changed, 5 insertions(+), 5 deletions(-)

details.aggregated:
[review/shape-sort-mobile-hotfix cfe7f4d] hotfix: increase shape-sort tile size and drag padding for mobile
 2 files changed, 5 insertions(+), 5 deletions(-)

content.text:
Done. Here's what changed:

**`style.css`** — `.shape-tile` bumped from 72×72px → **96×96px** (border-radius scaled proportionally to 24px)

**`game.js`** — `tileSizePx` updated to match (96), and `dragPaddingPx` raised from 6 → **16px** so a finger doesn't need to land dead-center to start a drag

Branch `review/shape-sort-mobile-hotfix` is committed and pushed to `origin`.
